narrative:
Montgomery Twp. township has 1,207 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
